examples.question: how many games did the San Francisco Giants play the Los Angeles Dodgers in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE ((t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND t_away.name = 'Los Angeles Dodgers') OR (t_home.name = 'Los Angeles Dodgers' AND t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants')) AND YEAR(g.game_date) = 2025 AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final';

examples.question: game_pk, winner, game date how many games did the San Francisco Giants play the Los Angeles Dodgers in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) g.game_pk, CASE WHEN g.teams__home__score > g.teams__away__score THEN t_home.name ELSE t_away.name END AS winner, g.game_date FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE ((t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND t_away.name = 'Los Angeles Dodgers') OR (t_home.name = 'Los Angeles Dodgers' AND t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants')) AND YEAR(g.game_date) = 2025 AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY g.game_date;

examples.question: game_pk, winner or loser, game date for all double headers in the National League in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) g.game_pk, t_home.name AS home_team_name, t_away.name AS away_team_name, g.teams__home__score, g.teams__away__score, CASE WHEN g.teams__home__score > g.teams__away__score THEN t_home.name WHEN g.teams__away__score > g.teams__home__score THEN t_away.name ELSE 'Tie' END AS winner, CASE WHEN g.teams__home__score < g.teams__away__score THEN t_home.name WHEN g.teams__away__score < g.teams__home__score THEN t_away.name ELSE 'Tie' END AS loser, g.game_date, g.double_header FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE YEAR(g.game_date) = 2025 AND g.double_header = 'Y' AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND (t_home.league__name = 'National League' OR t_away.league__name = 'National League') ORDER BY g.game_date, g.game_pk;

examples.question: game_pk, opponent, winner or loser, score and game date how many regular season games did the San Francisco Giants play National League West opponents in 2025 and what were the results
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) g.game_pk, t_home.name AS home_team, t_away.name AS away_team, CASE WHEN t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' THEN 'Home' ELSE 'Away' END AS giants_home_or_away, CASE WHEN t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__home__score > g.teams__away__score THEN 'Winner' WHEN t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__home__score < g.teams__away__score THEN 'Loser' WHEN t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__away__score > g.teams__home__score THEN 'Winner' WHEN t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__away__score < g.teams__home__score THEN 'Loser' ELSE 'Tie' END AS giants_result, g.teams__home__score AS home_score, g.teams__away__score AS away_score, g.game_date FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE YEAR(g.game_date) = 2025 AND g.series_description = 'Regular Season' AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND (t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' OR t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants') AND t_home.division__name = 'National League West' AND t_away.division__name = 'National League West' ORDER BY g.game_date;

examples.question: game_pk, home team name, away team name for all games on 2025-06-30
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) g.game_pk, t_home.name AS Home, t_away.name AS Away FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE g.game_date = '2025-06-30';

examples.question: game_pk, home team name, away team name for all games on Opening Day
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) g.game_pk, t_home.name AS Home, t_away.name AS Away FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE g.game_date = '2025-03-27';

examples.question: player, position, signing bonus for the TOP 10 signing bonus in 2025 draft
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (10) d.person__full_name, d.person__primary_position__name, CAST(d.signing_bonus AS decimal(18,2)) AS signing_bonus FROM dw.draft d WHERE d.signing_bonus IS NOT NULL AND d.signing_bonus != '' AND d.year = 2025 ORDER BY CAST(d.signing_bonus AS decimal(18,2)) DESC;

examples.question: player, position, signing bonus for the TOP 3 signing bonus for each round in 2025 draft
examples.sql: SELECT d.pick_round AS round, d.person__full_name, d.person__primary_position__name, CAST(d.signing_bonus AS decimal(18,2)) AS signing_bonus FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pick_round ORDER BY CAST(ISNULL(NULLIF(signing_bonus, ''), '0') AS decimal(18,2)) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.draft WHERE year = 2025 AND signing_bonus IS NOT NULL AND signing_bonus <> '') d WHERE d.rn <= 3 ORDER BY d.pick_round, CAST(d.signing_bonus AS decimal(18,2)) DESC;

examples.question: year, round, position, pick count for each draft round in 2020-2025
examples.sql: SELECT d.year, d.pick_round AS round,CASE d.person__primary_position__name WHEN 'Outfield' THEN 'Outfielder' ELSE d.person__primary_position__name END AS position,COUNT(*) AS pick_count FROM dw.draft d WHERE d.year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2025 GROUP BY d.year, d.pick_round,d.person__primary_position__name ORDER BY d.year, d.pick_round, pick_count DESC;

examples.question: award, season, team, player, position for AL Top Awards
examples.sql: SELECT a.award_name, a.season, t.team_name, a.player_name, a.position_abbreviation FROM dw.award_recipients a LEFT JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = a.team_id WHERE a.season = 2025 AND a.award_name IN ('AL Silver Slugger','ALCS MVP','All-MLB First Team','All-MLB Second Team','AL Player of the Week','AL Hank Aaron Award','AL Cy Young','AL Comeback Player of the Year','AL All-Star') ORDER BY a.award_name, a.player_name;

examples.question: award, season, team, player, position for NL Top Awards
examples.sql: SELECT a.award_name, a.season, t.team_name, a.player_name, a.position_abbreviation FROM dw.award_recipients a LEFT JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = a.team_id WHERE a.season = 2025 AND a.award_name IN ('NL Silver Slugger','All-MLB First Team','All-MLB Second Team','NL Hank Aaron Award','NL Cy Young','NL Comeback Player of the Year','NL All-Star') ORDER BY a.award_name, a.player_name;

examples.question: pitcher, pitcher hand, batter side, pitch type, for strikeout pitches total strikeouts called or swinging and total strikeouts over 20
examples.sql: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type, total_strikeouts, called_k, swinging_k FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_strikeouts, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_called_strike = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS called_k, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_whiff = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS swinging_k, AVG(p.start_speed) AS avg_velo, AVG(p.spin_rate) AS avg_spin, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.strikes = 2 AND (p.is_called_strike = 1 OR p.is_whiff = 1) AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

examples.question: pitcher, pitcher hand, batter side, pitch type, for first pitches
examples.sql: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_strikeouts, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_called_strike = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS called_k, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_whiff = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS swinging_k, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.pitch_number = 1 AND (p.is_called_strike = 1 OR p.is_whiff = 1) AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

examples.question: pitcher name, season, pitch type, total pitch, usage, average velocity, average spin rate, whiff rate, in play rate and strike rate for Top 20 pitchers based on strike rate
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) full_name, season, pitch_description, total_pitches, usage_pct, avg_velocity, avg_spin_rate, whiff_rate, in_play_rate, strike_rate FROM (SELECT p.full_name, f.season, t.pitch_description, f.total_pitches, f.usage_pct, f.avg_velocity, f.avg_spin_rate, f.whiff_rate, f.in_play_rate, f.strike_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.pitcher_id, f.season ORDER BY f.total_pitches DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitcher_pitch_type_features f JOIN dw.pitch_type t ON t.pitch_type = f.pitch_type LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = f.pitcher_id WHERE f.pitch_type IS NOT NULL AND p.full_name IS NOT NULL AND f.total_pitches > 200 AND f.season = 2025) ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY strike_rate DESC;

examples.question: top 20 hitters by exit velocity in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) h.player_id, p.full_name, h.season, h.avg_exit_velocity, h.avg_launch_angle, h.hard_hit_rate, h.barrel_rate FROM dw.hitter_season_features h LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = h.player_id WHERE h.season = 2025 AND h.plate_appearances >= 100 ORDER BY h.avg_exit_velocity DESC;

examples.question: top 20 hitters by barrel rate in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) h.player_id, p.full_name, h.season, h.barrel_rate, h.avg_exit_velocity, h.avg_launch_angle, h.hard_hit_rate FROM dw.hitter_season_features h LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = h.player_id WHERE h.season = 2025 AND h.plate_appearances >= 100 ORDER BY h.barrel_rate DESC;

examples.question: top 20 hitters by wrc_plus in 2025

examples.question: top 20 hitters by OBP in 2025

examples.question: top 20 hitters by slugging percentage in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) h.player_id, p.full_name, h.season, h.slg, h.iso, h.obp, h.wrc_plus, h.plate_appearances FROM dw.hitter_season_features h LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = h.player_id WHERE h.season = 2025 AND h.plate_appearances >= 100 ORDER BY h.slg DESC;

examples.question: top 20 fastest sprint speed hitters in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) h.player_id, p.full_name, h.season, h.sprint_speed, h.plate_appearances FROM dw.hitter_season_features h LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = h.player_id WHERE h.season = 2025 AND h.sprint_speed IS NOT NULL ORDER BY h.sprint_speed DESC;

examples.question: top 20 hitters by contact rate in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) h.player_id, p.full_name, h.season, h.contact_rate, h.whiff_rate, h.plate_appearances FROM dw.hitter_season_features h LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = h.player_id WHERE h.season = 2025 AND h.plate_appearances >= 100 ORDER BY h.contact_rate DESC;

examples.question: hitters with the highest whiff rate in 2025

examples.question: hitter season stats for a specific player across all seasons
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) h.season, p.full_name, h.plate_appearances, h.avg_exit_velocity, h.avg_launch_angle, h.hard_hit_rate, h.barrel_rate, h.contact_rate, h.whiff_rate, h.obp, h.slg, h.iso, h.wrc_plus, h.sprint_speed FROM dw.hitter_season_features h LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = h.player_id WHERE p.full_name = 'Mookie Betts' ORDER BY h.season DESC;

examples.question: average exit velocity and barrel rate by season 2020 to 2025
examples.sql: SELECT h.season, COUNT(*) AS hitter_count, AVG(h.avg_exit_velocity) AS avg_exit_velo, AVG(h.barrel_rate) AS avg_barrel_rate, AVG(h.hard_hit_rate) AS avg_hard_hit_rate, AVG(h.wrc_plus) AS avg_wrc_plus FROM dw.hitter_season_features h WHERE h.season BETWEEN 2020 AND 2025 AND h.plate_appearances >= 100 GROUP BY h.season ORDER BY h.season;

examples.question: all season dates for 2025

examples.question: when does the 2025 regular season start and end
examples.sql: SELECT h.season, COUNT(*) AS hitter_count, AVG(h.avg_exit_velocity) AS avg_exit_velo, AVG(h.barrel_rate) AS avg_barrel_rate FROM dw.hitter_season_features h WHERE h.season BETWEEN 2020 AND 2025 AND h.plate_appearances >= 100 GROUP BY h.season ORDER BY h.season;

examples.question: when is the 2025 all star game
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (1) s.season, s.all_star_date FROM dw.seasons s WHERE s.season = 2025;

examples.question: when does 2025 spring training start and end

examples.question: when does the 2025 postseason start and end

examples.question: which seasons have a wildcard

examples.question: all season start and end dates for every season
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) s.season, s.regular_season_start_date, s.regular_season_end_date, s.post_season_start_date, s.post_season_end_date FROM dw.seasons s ORDER BY s.season DESC;

examples.question: what is the qualifier plate appearances and outs pitched for 2025

examples.question: first and second half dates for the 2025 season

examples.question: when does the 2025 offseason start and end
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (1) s.season, s.offseason_start_date, s.off_season_end_date FROM dw.seasons s WHERE s.season = 2025;

examples.question: when does 2025 preseason start and end

examples.question: all star dates for every season
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) s.season, s.all_star_date FROM dw.seasons s WHERE s.all_star_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.season DESC;

examples.question: how many days long is the 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (1) s.season, s.regular_season_start_date, s.regular_season_end_date, DATEDIFF(day, s.regular_season_start_date, s.regular_season_end_date) AS regular_season_days FROM dw.seasons s WHERE s.season = 2025;

examples.question: how many days long is the 2025 postseason
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (1) s.season, s.post_season_start_date, s.post_season_end_date, DATEDIFF(day, s.post_season_start_date, s.post_season_end_date) AS postseason_days FROM dw.seasons s WHERE s.season = 2025;

examples.question: regular season length in days for each season
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) s.season, s.regular_season_start_date, s.regular_season_end_date, DATEDIFF(day, s.regular_season_start_date, s.regular_season_end_date) AS regular_season_days FROM dw.seasons s WHERE s.regular_season_start_date IS NOT NULL AND s.regular_season_end_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.season DESC;

examples.question: qualifier plate appearances by season
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) s.season, s.qualifier_plate_appearances, s.qualifier_outs_pitched FROM dw.seasons s WHERE s.qualifier_plate_appearances IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.season DESC;

examples.question: what season is currently active today
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (1) s.season, s.season_start_date, s.season_end_date, s.regular_season_start_date, s.regular_season_end_date FROM dw.seasons s WHERE GETDATE() BETWEEN s.season_start_date AND s.season_end_date ORDER BY s.season DESC;

examples.question: spring training dates for every season
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) s.season, s.spring_start_date, s.spring_end_date, DATEDIFF(day, s.spring_start_date, s.spring_end_date) AS spring_training_days FROM dw.seasons s WHERE s.spring_start_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.season DESC;

examples.question: complete calendar for the 2025 season all key dates

examples.question: seasons where postseason started before October
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) s.season, s.post_season_start_date FROM dw.seasons s WHERE s.post_season_start_date IS NOT NULL AND MONTH(s.post_season_start_date) < 10 ORDER BY s.season DESC;

examples.question: top 20 OPS leaders in 2025

examples.question: top 20 WHIP leaders in 2025

examples.question: top 20 wins leaders pitchers in 2020-2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, SUM(ps.stat__wins) AS total_wins, ps.team__name FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season BETWEEN 2020 AND 2025 AND ps.stat__wins IS NOT NULL AND ps.position__type = 'Pitcher' GROUP BY ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name ORDER BY total_wins DESC;

examples.question: top 20 saves leaders in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__saves, ps.stat__save_opportunities, ps.stat__blown_saves, ps.stat__era FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__saves IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ps.stat__saves DESC;

examples.question: season stats for a specific player
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) ps.season, ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.stat__games_played, ps.stat__at_bats, ps.stat__hits, ps.stat__home_runs, ps.stat__rbi, ps.stat__avg, ps.stat__obp, ps.stat__slg, ps.stat__ops FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.player__full_name = 'Mookie Betts' ORDER BY ps.season DESC;

examples.question: all stats for a specific player in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (10) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__games_played, ps.stat__at_bats, ps.stat__hits, ps.stat__doubles, ps.stat__triples, ps.stat__home_runs, ps.stat__rbi, ps.stat__stolen_bases, ps.stat__avg, ps.stat__obp, ps.stat__slg, ps.stat__ops FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.player__full_name = 'Freddie Freeman' AND ps.season = 2025;

examples.question: top 20 hits leaders in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__hits, ps.stat__at_bats, ps.stat__avg FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__hits IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ps.stat__hits DESC;

examples.question: top 20 doubles leaders in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__doubles, ps.stat__hits, ps.stat__games_played FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__doubles IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ps.stat__doubles DESC;

examples.question: top 20 walks leaders in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__base_on_balls, ps.stat__intentional_walks, ps.stat__obp FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__base_on_balls IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ps.stat__base_on_balls DESC;

examples.question: top 20 strikeout batters in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__strike_outs, ps.stat__at_bats, ps.stat__games_played FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__strike_outs IS NOT NULL AND ps.position__type = 'Hitter' ORDER BY ps.stat__strike_outs DESC;

examples.question: all San Francisco Giants hitter stats in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) ps.player__full_name, ps.stat__games_played, ps.stat__at_bats, ps.stat__hits, ps.stat__home_runs, ps.stat__rbi, ps.stat__avg, ps.stat__obp, ps.stat__slg, ps.stat__ops FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.team__name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND ps.position__type = 'Hitter' ORDER BY ps.stat__at_bats DESC;

examples.question: all San Francisco Giants pitcher stats in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) ps.player__full_name, ps.stat__games_played, ps.stat__games_started, ps.stat__wins, ps.stat__losses, ps.stat__era, ps.stat__innings_pitched, ps.stat__strike_outs, ps.stat__whip FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.team__name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND ps.position__type = 'Pitcher' ORDER BY ps.stat__innings_pitched DESC;

examples.question: top 20 fielding percentage leaders in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.position__name, ps.season, ps.stat__fielding, ps.stat__put_outs, ps.stat__assists, ps.stat__errors, ps.stat__chances FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__fielding IS NOT NULL AND ps.stat__chances >= 100 ORDER BY CAST(ps.stat__fielding AS decimal(10,3)) DESC;

examples.question: top 20 strikeouts per 9 innings for pitchers in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__strikeouts_per9_inn, ps.stat__strike_outs, ps.stat__innings_pitched, ps.stat__era FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__strikeouts_per9_inn IS NOT NULL AND ps.stat__games_started >= 10 ORDER BY CAST(ps.stat__strikeouts_per9_inn AS decimal(10,2)) DESC;

examples.question: pitchers with the most complete games in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__complete_games, ps.stat__shutouts, ps.stat__wins, ps.stat__era FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__complete_games > 0 ORDER BY ps.stat__complete_games DESC;

examples.question: pitchers with most wild pitches in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__wild_pitches, ps.stat__innings_pitched FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__wild_pitches IS NOT NULL AND ps.position__type = 'Pitcher' ORDER BY ps.stat__wild_pitches DESC;

examples.question: top 20 total bases leaders in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__total_bases, ps.stat__hits, ps.stat__home_runs, ps.stat__slg FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__total_bases IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ps.stat__total_bases DESC;

examples.question: players with the most ground into double plays in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__ground_into_double_play, ps.stat__at_bats, ps.stat__hits FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__ground_into_double_play IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ps.stat__ground_into_double_play DESC;

examples.question: top 20 on base percentage leaders in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__obp, ps.stat__hits, ps.stat__base_on_balls, ps.stat__plate_appearances FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__obp IS NOT NULL AND ps.stat__plate_appearances >= 300 ORDER BY CAST(ps.stat__obp AS decimal(10,3)) DESC;

examples.question: pitchers with most holds in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__holds, ps.stat__games_pitched, ps.stat__era FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__holds IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ps.stat__holds DESC;

examples.question: career stats for a specific player all seasons
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) ps.season, ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.stat__games_played, ps.stat__hits, ps.stat__home_runs, ps.stat__rbi, ps.stat__avg, ps.stat__ops FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.player__full_name = 'Clayton Kershaw' ORDER BY ps.season ASC;

examples.question: top 20 slugging percentage leaders in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__slg, ps.stat__total_bases, ps.stat__home_runs, ps.stat__at_bats FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__slg IS NOT NULL AND ps.stat__plate_appearances >= 300 ORDER BY CAST(ps.stat__slg AS decimal(10,3)) DESC;

examples.question: relief pitchers with most appearances in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) ps.player__full_name, ps.team__name, ps.season, ps.stat__games_pitched, ps.stat__games_started, ps.stat__saves, ps.stat__holds, ps.stat__era FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__games_pitched IS NOT NULL AND ps.stat__games_started = 0 ORDER BY ps.stat__games_pitched DESC;

examples.question: league hitting stats averages in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT ps.league__name, ps.season, AVG(CAST(ps.stat__avg AS decimal(10,3))) AS league_avg, AVG(CAST(ps.stat__obp AS decimal(10,3))) AS league_obp, AVG(CAST(ps.stat__slg AS decimal(10,3))) AS league_slg, AVG(CAST(ps.stat__ops AS decimal(10,3))) AS league_ops, SUM(ps.stat__home_runs) AS total_hr FROM dw.player_stats ps WHERE ps.season = 2025 AND ps.stat__avg IS NOT NULL AND ps.stat__plate_appearances >= 100 AND ps.position__type = 'Hitter' GROUP BY ps.league__name, ps.season ORDER BY ps.league__name;

examples.question: how many games were played in the 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final';

examples.question: game_pk, home team, away team, home score, away score for all games on 2025-04-15
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score FROM dw.games WHERE CAST(game_date AS date) = '2025-04-15' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: all day games in 2025 regular season with home team, away team, and score
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND day_night = 'day' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: all night games in 2025 regular season count
examples.sql: SELECT day_night, COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' GROUP BY day_night ORDER BY game_count DESC;

examples.question: all double header games in 2025 with home team, away team, and date
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, game_date, game_number FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND double_header = 'Y' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY game_date, teams__home__team__name, game_number;

examples.question: count of double header games in 2025 by team
examples.sql: SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, COUNT(*) AS doubleheader_games FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND double_header = 'Y' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' GROUP BY teams__home__team__name ORDER BY doubleheader_games DESC;

examples.question: all postponed or suspended games in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, game_date, status__detailed_state, status__reason, reschedule_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND status__detailed_state IN ('Postponed', 'Suspended') ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: rescheduled games in 2025 original game date
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, rescheduled_from_date AS original_date, official_date AS new_date, status__reason FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND rescheduled_from_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY rescheduled_from_date;

examples.question: games rescheduled in 2025 with original date and new date
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, rescheduled_from_date AS original_date, official_date AS new_date, status__reason FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND rescheduled_from_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY rescheduled_from_date;

examples.question: all tie games in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND is_tie = 1 AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: games played at each venue in 2025 with game count
examples.sql: SELECT venue__name, COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' GROUP BY venue__name ORDER BY game_count DESC;

examples.question: highest scoring games in 2025 regular season top 20 by total runs
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, (teams__home__score + teams__away__score) AS total_runs, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY total_runs DESC;

examples.question: lowest scoring completed games in 2025 regular season top 20 by total runs
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, (teams__home__score + teams__away__score) AS total_runs, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY total_runs ASC;

examples.question: shutout games in 2025 regular season with winning and losing team
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, game_date, CASE WHEN teams__home__score > 0 AND teams__away__score = 0 THEN teams__home__team__name WHEN teams__away__score > 0 AND teams__home__score = 0 THEN teams__away__team__name END AS winning_team FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND (teams__home__score = 0 OR teams__away__score = 0) AND is_tie = 0 ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: how many shutouts did each team pitch in 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT shutout_team, COUNT(*) AS shutouts FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN teams__home__score = 0 THEN teams__away__team__name WHEN teams__away__score = 0 THEN teams__home__team__name END AS shutout_team FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND (teams__home__score = 0 OR teams__away__score = 0) AND is_tie = 0) s WHERE shutout_team IS NOT NULL GROUP BY shutout_team ORDER BY shutouts DESC;

examples.question: home wins and away wins for each team in 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT team, SUM(home_win) AS home_wins, SUM(away_win) AS away_wins FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, 1 AS home_win, 0 AS away_win FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND teams__home__is_winner = 1 UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, 0 AS home_win, 1 AS away_win FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND teams__away__is_winner = 1) w GROUP BY team ORDER BY home_wins DESC;

examples.question: all 2025 postseason games with home team, away team, score, series, and date
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, series_description, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND game_type IN ('D','L','W','F') AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: number of games in each postseason series in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT series_description, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, COUNT(*) AS games_played FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND game_type IN ('D','L','W','F') AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' GROUP BY series_description, teams__home__team__name, teams__away__team__name ORDER BY MIN(game_date);

examples.question: all 2025 spring training games with home team, away team, and score
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND game_type = 'S' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: games won by the home team vs away team in 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS home_wins, SUM(CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS away_wins, COUNT(*) AS total_games, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS float) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS home_win_pct FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND is_tie = 0;

examples.question: games per month in 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT MONTH(game_date) AS month_num, DATENAME(MONTH, game_date) AS month_name, COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' GROUP BY MONTH(game_date), DATENAME(MONTH, game_date) ORDER BY month_num;

examples.question: games played on each day of the week in 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT DATENAME(WEEKDAY, game_date) AS day_of_week, DATEPART(WEEKDAY, game_date) AS day_num, COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' GROUP BY DATENAME(WEEKDAY, game_date), DATEPART(WEEKDAY, game_date) ORDER BY day_num;

examples.question: all extra inning games in 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, scheduled_innings, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND scheduled_innings > 9 ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: walk-off wins in 2025 regular season where home team won
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND teams__home__is_winner = 1 AND teams__home__score > teams__away__score ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: series game number and games in series for all 2025 regular season series between two specific teams Giants and Dodgers
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, series_game_number, games_in_series, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND ((teams__home__team__name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND teams__away__team__name = 'Los Angeles Dodgers') OR (teams__home__team__name = 'Los Angeles Dodgers' AND teams__away__team__name = 'San Francisco Giants')) ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: average runs scored per game by home team and away team in 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(teams__home__score AS float)) AS avg_home_runs, AVG(CAST(teams__away__score AS float)) AS avg_away_runs, AVG(CAST(teams__home__score + teams__away__score AS float)) AS avg_total_runs FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final';

examples.question: all 2025 regular season games not yet played or in progress
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, game_date, status__detailed_state FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state NOT IN ('Final', 'Postponed', 'Suspended', 'Cancelled') ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: one run games in 2025 regular season count per team
examples.sql: SELECT team, COUNT(*) AS one_run_games FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN teams__home__team__name ELSE teams__away__team__name END AS team FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND ABS(teams__home__score - teams__away__score) = 1) t GROUP BY team ORDER BY one_run_games DESC;

examples.question: largest margin of victory games in 2025 regular season top 10
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (10) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, ABS(teams__home__score - teams__away__score) AS run_margin, CASE WHEN teams__home__score > teams__away__score THEN teams__home__team__name ELSE teams__away__team__name END AS winning_team, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY run_margin DESC;

examples.question: win loss record for each team in 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT team, SUM(wins) AS wins, SUM(losses) AS losses, CAST(SUM(wins) AS float) / NULLIF(SUM(wins) + SUM(losses), 0) AS win_pct FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final') r GROUP BY team ORDER BY win_pct DESC;

examples.question: all 2025 regular season games for a specific team New York Yankees including opponent, score, home or away, and date
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (162) game_pk, CASE WHEN teams__home__team__name = 'New York Yankees' THEN 'Home' ELSE 'Away' END AS home_away, CASE WHEN teams__home__team__name = 'New York Yankees' THEN teams__away__team__name ELSE teams__home__team__name END AS opponent, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, CASE WHEN teams__home__team__name = 'New York Yankees' AND teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 'W' WHEN teams__away__team__name = 'New York Yankees' AND teams__away__is_winner = 1 THEN 'W' WHEN is_tie = 1 THEN 'T' ELSE 'L' END AS result, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND (teams__home__team__name = 'New York Yankees' OR teams__away__team__name = 'New York Yankees') ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: total runs scored by each team home and away combined in 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT team, SUM(runs_scored) AS total_runs, SUM(runs_allowed) AS total_runs_allowed FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, teams__home__score AS runs_scored, teams__away__score AS runs_allowed FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, teams__away__score AS runs_scored, teams__home__score AS runs_allowed FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final') rs GROUP BY team ORDER BY total_runs DESC;

examples.question: all awards won by Shohei Ohtani across all seasons
examples.sql: SELECT a.season, a.award_name, a.award_date, t.name AS team_name, a.position_name FROM dw.award_recipients a LEFT JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = a.team_id WHERE a.player_name = 'Shohei Ohtani' ORDER BY a.season DESC, a.award_name;

examples.question: all awards won by Mookie Betts across all seasons
examples.sql: SELECT a.season, a.award_name, a.award_date, t.name AS team_name, a.position_name FROM dw.award_recipients a LEFT JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = a.team_id WHERE a.player_name = 'Mookie Betts' ORDER BY a.season DESC, a.award_name;

examples.question: all awards won by Freddie Freeman across all seasons
examples.sql: SELECT a.season, a.award_name, a.award_date, t.name AS team_name, a.position_name FROM dw.award_recipients a LEFT JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = a.team_id WHERE a.player_name = 'Freddie Freeman' ORDER BY a.season DESC, a.award_name;

examples.question: all awards won by Aaron Judge across all seasons
examples.sql: SELECT a.season, a.award_name, a.award_date, t.name AS team_name, a.position_name FROM dw.award_recipients a LEFT JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = a.team_id WHERE a.player_name = 'Aaron Judge' ORDER BY a.season DESC, a.award_name;

examples.question: all awards won by Gerrit Cole across all seasons
examples.sql: SELECT a.season, a.award_name, a.award_date, t.name AS team_name, a.position_name FROM dw.award_recipients a LEFT JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = a.team_id WHERE a.player_name = 'Gerrit Cole' ORDER BY a.season DESC, a.award_name;

examples.question: total number of awards won by each team all time sorted by most awards
examples.sql: SELECT t.name AS team_name, COUNT(*) AS total_awards FROM dw.award_recipients a JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = a.team_id GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY total_awards DESC;

examples.question: total number of awards won by each team in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT t.name AS team_name, COUNT(*) AS total_awards FROM dw.award_recipients a JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = a.team_id WHERE a.season = '2025' GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY total_awards DESC;

examples.question: total number of awards won by each team by season from 2020 to 2025
examples.sql: SELECT a.season, t.name AS team_name, COUNT(*) AS total_awards FROM dw.award_recipients a JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = a.team_id WHERE a.season BETWEEN '2020' AND '2025' GROUP BY a.season, t.name ORDER BY a.season DESC, total_awards DESC;

examples.question: which team has won the most Cy Young awards all time

examples.question: all 2025 regular season games for the Los Angeles Dodgers including opponent score and result

examples.question: win loss record for each American League team in 2025 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT team, SUM(wins) AS wins, SUM(losses) AS losses, CAST(SUM(wins) AS float) / NULLIF(SUM(wins) + SUM(losses), 0) AS win_pct FROM (SELECT t_home.name AS team, CASE WHEN g.teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN g.teams__home__is_winner = 0 AND g.is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id WHERE g.season = '2025' AND g.series_description = 'Regular Season' AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND t_home.league__name = 'American League' UNION ALL SELECT t_away.name AS team, CASE WHEN g.teams__away__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN g.teams__away__is_winner = 0 AND g.is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE g.season = '2025' AND g.series_description = 'Regular Season' AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND t_away.league__name = 'American League') r GROUP BY team ORDER BY win_pct DESC;

examples.question: pitcher batter side and pitch type for most used pitches on three ball counts in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.balls = 3 AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

examples.question: pitcher batter side and pitch type for pitches thrown with two strikes two balls in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.balls = 2 AND p.strikes = 2 AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

examples.question: how many games did the New York Yankees play the Boston Red Sox in 2023
examples.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE ((t_home.name = 'New York Yankees' AND t_away.name = 'Boston Red Sox') OR (t_home.name = 'Boston Red Sox' AND t_away.name = 'New York Yankees')) AND YEAR(g.game_date) = 2023 AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final';

examples.question: highest scoring games in 2023 regular season top 20 by total runs
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, (teams__home__score + teams__away__score) AS total_runs, game_date FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY total_runs DESC;

examples.question: shutout games in 2023 regular season with winning and losing team
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, game_date, CASE WHEN teams__home__score > 0 AND teams__away__score = 0 THEN teams__home__team__name WHEN teams__away__score > 0 AND teams__home__score = 0 THEN teams__away__team__name END AS winning_team FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND (teams__home__score = 0 OR teams__away__score = 0) AND is_tie = 0 ORDER BY game_date;

examples.question: all double header games in 2023 with home team, away team, and date
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (100) game_pk, teams__home__team__name AS home_team, teams__away__team__name AS away_team, teams__home__score AS home_score, teams__away__score AS away_score, game_date, game_number FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND double_header = 'Y' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' ORDER BY game_date, teams__home__team__name, game_number;

examples.question: win loss record for each team in 2023 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT team, SUM(wins) AS wins, SUM(losses) AS losses, CAST(SUM(wins) AS float) / NULLIF(SUM(wins) + SUM(losses), 0) AS win_pct FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final') r GROUP BY team ORDER BY win_pct DESC;

examples.question: games per month in 2023 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT MONTH(game_date) AS month_num, DATENAME(MONTH, game_date) AS month_name, COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' GROUP BY MONTH(game_date), DATENAME(MONTH, game_date) ORDER BY month_num;

examples.question: home wins and away wins for each team in 2023 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT team, SUM(home_win) AS home_wins, SUM(away_win) AS away_wins FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, 1 AS home_win, 0 AS away_win FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND teams__home__is_winner = 1 UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, 0 AS home_win, 1 AS away_win FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND teams__away__is_winner = 1) w GROUP BY team ORDER BY home_wins DESC;

examples.question: win loss record for each team in 2022 regular season
examples.sql: SELECT team, SUM(wins) AS wins, SUM(losses) AS losses, CAST(SUM(wins) AS float) / NULLIF(SUM(wins) + SUM(losses), 0) AS win_pct FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2022' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2022' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final') r GROUP BY team ORDER BY win_pct DESC;

examples.question: pitcher name,season,pitch type,whiff rate,strike rate for top 20 pitchers based on whiff rate in 2024
examples.sql: SELECT TOP (20) full_name, season, pitch_description, total_pitches, usage_pct, avg_velocity, avg_spin_rate, whiff_rate, in_play_rate, strike_rate FROM (SELECT p.full_name, f.season, t.pitch_description, f.total_pitches, f.usage_pct, f.avg_velocity, f.avg_spin_rate, f.whiff_rate, f.in_play_rate, f.strike_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.pitcher_id, f.season ORDER BY f.total_pitches DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitcher_pitch_type_features f JOIN dw.pitch_type t ON t.pitch_type = f.pitch_type LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = f.pitcher_id WHERE f.pitch_type IS NOT NULL AND p.full_name IS NOT NULL AND f.total_pitches > 200 AND f.season = 2024) ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY whiff_rate DESC;

examples.question: pitcher batter side and pitch type for most used pitches on three ball counts in 2023
examples.sql: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.balls = 3 AND p.season = 2023 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

examples.question: pitcher batter side and pitch type for pitches thrown with two strikes no balls in 2025

examples.question: pitcher batter side and pitch type for pitches thrown with one ball one strike in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.balls = 1 AND p.strikes = 1 AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

examples.question: pitcher batter side and pitch type for pitches thrown with two balls one strike in 2025
examples.sql: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.balls = 2 AND p.strikes = 1 AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

examples.question: pitcher pitcher hand batter side pitch type for strikeout pitches in 2023
examples.sql: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type, total_strikeouts, called_k, swinging_k FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_strikeouts, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_called_strike = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS called_k, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_whiff = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS swinging_k, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.strikes = 2 AND (p.is_called_strike = 1 OR p.is_whiff = 1) AND p.season = 2023 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

examples.question: pitcher and batter side for first pitches total called strikes and whiffs in 2024
examples.sql: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_called_strike = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS called_k, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_whiff = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS swinging_k, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.pitch_number = 1 AND (p.is_called_strike = 1 OR p.is_whiff = 1) AND p.season = 2024 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

examples.question: which team does the San Francisco Giants have the best home record against from 2020-2025
examples.sql: SELECT opponent,SUM(wins) AS wins,SUM(losses) AS losses,CAST(SUM(wins) AS float) / NULLIF(SUM(wins) + SUM(losses), 0) AS win_pct FROM (SELECT t_away.name AS opponent,CASE WHEN g.teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins,CASE WHEN g.teams__home__is_winner = 0 AND g.is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE g.season BETWEEN '2020' AND '2025' AND g.series_description = 'Regular Season' AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants') r GROUP BY opponent ORDER BY win_pct DESC;
